tier_rationale: This updates multiple operational guide documents with Researcher model-selection policy. It does not modify runtime product code.
request_summary: Persist the Researcher model-selection guidance so it is not lost after the session.
goal: Document an available-first Researcher model policy: use the strongest current supported model for high-value research, use lightweight models for low-risk lookups, and fallback to supported prior models when the latest model is unavailable.

positive: Update Researcher and Analyst guides with tiered model-selection criteria.
Update CURRENT_STATE.md authority versions and core decisions.
Record the official-docs basis and the availability check requirement.
negative: Do not hardcode unsupported model usage as mandatory.
Do not add runtime product code.
Do not remove the external CLI fallback execution recording requirement.
Do not allow Researcher to send results directly to Generator.

success_criteria: docs/agents/researcher.md documents model selection by research risk and cost.
docs/agents/analyst.md mirrors the model policy for Researcher handoff and fallback selection.
CURRENT_STATE.md records the updated document versions and Researcher model policy.
The policy states latest supported model first for high-value research, lightweight model for low-risk lookup, and gpt-5.4 fallback when gpt-5.5 is unavailable.
npm run check:encoding and node scripts/check-doc-headers.mjs pass.
Merged local task branch is deleted after main push.

context.relevant_history: TASK-20260427-087 clarified Researcher execution as an Analyst-invoked role/procedure with Codex CLI as optional fallback. The current task persists model-selection guidance discussed in the session.
source_basis: OpenAI API Models documentation indicated GPT-5.5 as the current strongest starting point when available.
Availability must be verified in the executing CLI/account before using a model ID.
